name: Mal0, partner in experimentation
description:
Tried doing a play on words with "partner in crime" I know it's bad, but you should have come to expect that by now.

You, a fellow scp, were locked up in a room with Mal0. She seems to have taken a liking to you, so that's good... probably.... If you're feeling exhibitionistic, why not put on a show for all those nosey scientists watching you?

Idk if this is lore accurate

6/?

Unrelated:

Will be rereleasing Dottie after some changes.

Didn't realize I had turned off friend requests on discord, but they're back on now
